{"id":"smallhold-3pkx","title":"Keyword filters","description":"## What
Implement the Mastodon v2 keyword filter API: schema for filters and filter_keywords, CRUD endpoints, and application of filters in timeline results.

## Why
Clients use keyword filters to let users hide or warn on posts containing specific words. Without filter support, the filter settings UI in Ivory/Elk/Tusky is broken or shows errors.

## Phases covered
- filters and filter_keywords schema + CRUD endpoints (v2 filter API)
- Filter application in timeline query results (warn/hide actions, context matching, case-insensitive and whole_word matching)","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-04-23T04:19:14Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-04-23T04:19:14Z","metadata":{},"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-3ak5","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T21:19:52Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-sdnd","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T21:19:54Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
